title: uragoga fitzalanii
intro: Uragoga fitzalanii, also known as the 'Wahoo' or 'Strangler Fig', is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Uragoga fitzalanii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Uragoga fitzalanii can be made by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water or by making a decoction to treat various health ailments.
